infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: City Stories Guide uses your location to find and play stories about nearby places while you walk.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: City Stories Guide uses your location to find and play stories about nearby places while you walk.
